name: @haimang/orchestrator-core-worker
description: orchestrator-core worker — orchestration-facade F1 public start façade

scripts.prebuild: pnpm run prepare:package-manifest && pnpm --filter @haimang/jwt-shared build && pnpm --filter @haimang/orchestrator-auth-contract build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm run prepare:package-manifest && pnpm --filter @haimang/jwt-shared build && pnpm --filter @haimang/orchestrator-auth-contract build
scripts.pretest: pnpm run prepare:package-manifest && pnpm --filter @haimang/jwt-shared build && pnpm --filter @haimang/orchestrator-auth-contract build
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm run predeploy && pnpm build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm run predeploy && pnpm build && wrangler deploy
